description:
Run a CompGeom (Component Geometry) boolean intersection analysis on the eCRM-001 wing-body-tail configuration to compute the true wetted surface areas. The model is located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. 

1. Open the model in OpenVSP.
2. Navigate to the CompGeom analysis tool (Analysis > CompGeom) and run the boolean intersection to compute wetted areas.
3. Locate the generated CompGeom CSV results file and copy it to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_compgeom_results.csv.
4. Read the results and extract the per-component wetted areas and wet volumes.
5. Write a structured report to /home/ga/Desktop/wetted_area_report.txt that includes:
   - A component breakdown showing the 'Wetted Area' for each component
   - The 'Total Wetted Area' (sum of all components)
   - An explicit statement identifying the name of the component with the largest wetted area.
